explanation.summary: Fats are carrying this food most, while minerals are the biggest drag. It lands in A tier.
explanation.whyThisTier: This food lands in A tier with an overall score of 41 from a base nutrition score of 41. Context barely changed the result.

topPros.title: makes meals feel more balanced

topPros.explanation: A practical plus because good foods need realistic use cases.

closing.summary: Cabbage has a genuinely strong overall case. the practical downsides are real, but they do not outweigh the upside. best when you want low downside and easy micronutrient support.
closing.useCaseNote: Best when you want low downside and easy micronutrient support.
closing.cta: Would you rank it the same, or nah?
